events.event: Created neighbor-s3: Nearest neighbor search for Ruby and S3 Vectors
Created seaduck: Apache Iceberg for Ruby, powered by libduckdb
Created iceberg-ruby: Apache Iceberg for Ruby
Created ducklake-ruby: Run your own data lake with a SQL database and file/object storage
Announced pgvector availability on Amazon RDS and support for 11 programming language libraries
pgvector made available on Amazon RDS — Amazon RDS support for pgvector announced
Released pgvector: open-source PostgreSQL extension for vector similarity search
Gave talk "How Postgres Could Index Itself" at PostgresOpen (presenting Dexter, the automatic PostgreSQL indexer)
